---
title: "The Rev. Charles Lutwidge Dodgson"
---

## The Rev. Charles Lutwidge Dodgson

**Dates:** (1832-1898)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1881-4), mathematician, children\'s writer as ‘Lewis Carroll’

### Biography

Surrey Record Office MS G103/2/10 is a letter from Dodgson to Charles Manners of Barringer, Wallis and Manners, metal box manufacturers, dated 6 September 1892, with a list of names of friends, including CMY, to whom he would like sent a <i>Through the Looking Glass</i> biscuit tin.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 6th[?1898-1900] [[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 16th [1869]
- Letter from May 11th [1866]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
